---
title: Particle Scattering in Cusp-Like Current Sheet
---

# Interactive Parameters Scan

[Basic Parameters](web/transition_matrices/index.html)

[Field Line Profiles](web/fieldlines/index.html)

# Geometric Configuration

The corresponding field-line trajectory is

$$
x(z) = \frac{B_0}{B_n}\,\frac{\tfrac{1}{2}(z/L)^2}{1 + \tfrac{a}{2}(z/L)^2}
$$

which is the profile shown in the figure: field lines bend toward the
current sheet centre ($z=0$) from both sides and approach an asymptote
$x_\infty = B_0/(a B_n)$ as $|z|\to\infty$.

# References

- @artemyevIonMotionCurrent2013
- @artemyevSuperfastIonScattering2020
- @malaraChargedparticleChaoticDynamics2021
